SLACK_BOT_TOKEN.instructions:
1. Abra: https://api.slack.com/apps
2. Clique 'Create New App' > 'From scratch'
3. Nome: 'Claude Assistant', escolha seu workspace
4. No menu lateral: 'OAuth & Permissions'
5. Em 'Bot Token Scopes', adicione:
   - channels:history
   - channels:read
   - chat:write
   - users:read
6. Clique 'Install to Workspace' no topo da pagina
7. Autorize
8. Copie o 'Bot User OAuth Token' (comeca com xoxb-)
